_readme: Voice scripts for FamilyLearn.AI promo video. Each line maps to a translation key in src/i18n/translations.ts. Use this JSON to generate locale-specific TTS scripts via scripts/generate-locale-scripts.mjs

alex.voice_description: Man — enthusiastic, relatable, slightly frustrated then excited

maya.voice_description: Woman — warm, confident, clear and encouraging

scenes.title: Cold Open
scenes.tone: Frustrated, relatable tone for Alex; warm, confident for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: Ugh — homework again?

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: I don't even know where to start…

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: What if help was always just one tap away?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: FamilyLearn.AI is your personal AI tutor — available 24/7, on any device, in over 20 languages.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: So whether I'm on my phone, tablet, or laptop — it's always there?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Exactly. Let me show you — starting with how it sets up your subjects.

scenes.title: Smart Setup
scenes.tone: Curious tone for Alex; warm, clear for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: But how does it know what subjects I have?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Just snap a photo of your class schedule — FamilyLearn.AI reads it and sets up all your subjects automatically.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: My whole semester organized in seconds?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: One scan, and you're all set. The AI handles the rest.

scenes.title: Scan & Solve
scenes.tone: Curious, excited tone for Alex; clear, enthusiastic for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: Nice! Now I've got actual homework — a photo works for that too?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Snap a photo, paste a link, or just type it in — FamilyLearn.AI reads it instantly and organises everything by subject.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: Photos, links, typed text — all in one chat?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Exactly. Send it any way you like — FamilyLearn.AI does the rest.

scenes.title: AI Chat Assistant
scenes.tone: Inquisitive tone for Alex; reassuring, friendly for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: And if I'm stuck on a problem — can I just ask?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Ask anything — step-by-step solutions, hints, or full explanations. Your AI tutor is always here.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: It's like a tutor that never gets tired?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: One that knows exactly where you're struggling — and guides you forward from there.

scenes.title: Instant AI Verification
scenes.tone: Inquisitive tone for Alex; clear, confident for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: And before my exam — can it check what I actually know?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: It builds practice problems from your own materials — then tests if you really understand.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: So I know I really learned it — not just memorized it?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Real understanding, verified.

scenes.title: Family Learning Hub
scenes.tone: Lighthearted, slightly amused for Alex; warm, reassuring for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: And my parents — can they see how I'm doing?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Parents get their own dashboard — progress, streaks, and activity for every child.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: So she'll stop asking if I did my homework?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Everything transparently — and safely.

scenes.title: Listen & Learn
scenes.tone: Curious, energetic for Alex; enthusiastic for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: Can I also listen to study audio while commuting — like a podcast?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Add any audio to a playlist — lectures, voice notes, summaries — and study on the go. Every session earns Learn Points.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: Learn Points? Like a game?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Every playlist you complete, every practice session — points stack up and your level grows.

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: And here's the best part — every win gets tracked.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: Streaks, achievements, progress charts — it's all there?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Your journey, your growth, celebrated every step of the way.

scenes.title: Call to Action
scenes.tone: Excited, convincing for Alex; warm, inviting closing tone for Maya

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: Okay — I want this. Where do I get it?

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Download FamilyLearn.AI free — from the App Store or Google Play. Over a thousand families are already learning smarter.

lines.speaker: alex
lines.en: I'm in. Starting today.

lines.speaker: maya
lines.en: Start learning smarter — today.
